app.name: Mannalmalle
app.description: Pick the best date to meet with a group, fast.

time-scheduling.title: Time
time-scheduling.description: Find the best date and time from everyone's availability.

all-available.title: Everyone
all-available.description: Find dates that work for everyone.

max-available.title: Most Available
max-available.description: Find dates that work for the largest number of people.

minimum-required.title: Minimum Required
minimum-required.description: Find dates that work for at least the required number of people.

home.contactHelp: We will send a Kakao notification when voting is complete.
home.requiredErrorDescription: Please fill in all required information.

vote.dateInstruction: Select all dates that work for you.
vote.timeInstruction: Select all dates and times that work for you.
vote.clickDateForTime: Click a date to select times.
vote.sameTimeForDates: The same times will be applied to {count} dates.
vote.completeHint: Existing voters can still update their vote by using the same name.

results.calendarDescription: Darker dates were selected by more people. Click a date to see details.
results.timeCalendarDescription: Click a date to view time-slot availability.
results.bestTimesDescription: Time ranges that work for the most people
results.noVotesInMonth: There are no votable dates in this month.
results.timeDetailDescription: Click a time slot to see who is available.

share.guide: Share it with friends and collect votes.
share.kakaoFailed: Failed to share via KakaoTalk. Please try again.
share.inviteFailed: Failed to send notifications. Please try again.

guidePage.title: How Meet or Not works
guidePage.description: Meet or Not provides different voting methods and result calculations for different scheduling needs.

all.title: Everyone available
all.description: Use this when you need a date that works for everyone.
all.completion: Voting completes when the number of participants set during creation has voted.
all.recommended: Meetings where everyone must attend, club gatherings

max.title: Most available
max.description: Use this to find the date that works for the largest number of people.
max.completion: Voting completes when the number of participants set during creation has voted.
max.recommended: Events where full attendance is not required, but more people is better

required.title: Minimum required
required.description: Use this to find dates where at least a required number of people can attend.
required.completion: Voting completes once a date reaches the required number of available participants.
required.recommended: Team schedules, meetings that require a minimum attendance

time.title: Time
time.description: Use this when you need to decide both the date and the time.
time.completion: Voting completes when the number of participants set during creation has voted.
time.features: 30-minute time slots, continuous time range suggestions, date-by-date time availability
time.recommended: Meeting time coordination, study sessions, appointments that need exact timing

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Save frequently invited members as groups and manage appointments more easily.
groups.createBody: Create groups from My Page, or save voters directly as a group from the results page.
groups.notifyBody: After creating an appointment, select group members in the share modal to send individual voting notifications.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.anonymousA: No. Participants can see who voted for which dates.
faq.editA: Yes. Vote again with the same name and your previous vote will be replaced.
faq.kakaoA: No. They are optional, but they help participants notice and check results faster.

feedbackPage.title: Feedback
feedbackPage.description: Send us your thoughts to help make Meet or Not better.
feedbackPage.formDescription: Bug reports, feature ideas, improvement requests, and any other feedback are welcome.
feedbackPage.name: Name (optional)
feedbackPage.emailPlaceholder: Enter this if you want a reply
feedbackPage.messagePlaceholder: Describe your feedback in detail. For bugs, include when and how the issue happened.
feedbackPage.successDescription: Thanks for your feedback. We will review it.

guide.bugBody: Tell us the situation, expected result, actual result, device, and browser.
guide.featureBody: Tell us what feature you need, why you need it, and how it should work.
guide.improvementBody: Tell us what is inconvenient, how it could improve, and any concrete examples.
